clusters.leadHeadline: Illinois Lawmakers Race to Finalize $5B Bears Stadium Deal Before Deadline
clusters.summary: Illinois legislature pushing through $5B public funding package for Chicago Bears stadium as relocation threat looms. Decision could reshape NFL stadium economics and set precedent for public financing models.

clusters.leadHeadline: Churchill Downs Acquires Preakness Stakes IP Rights for $85M
clusters.summary: Churchill Downs consolidates control of two Triple Crown races by acquiring Preakness Stakes intellectual property. Move centralizes media rights and branding across racing's flagship events.

clusters.leadHeadline: NWSL Awards 18th Expansion Team to Columbus; Haslams Pay $205M
clusters.summary: Women's soccer league adds Columbus franchise to Haslam Sports Group portfolio at $205M valuation. Expansion signals continued league growth and investor confidence in NWSL commercial viability.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Rookie Deals Will Exceed $50M for First Time Since 2010
clusters.summary: Top 2026 NFL draft pick will earn nearly $55M, marking first time rookie contracts cross $50M threshold. Reflects continued salary inflation and upfront guaranteed money in draft compensation.

clusters.leadHeadline: College Sports NIL Dispute Over 'Associated Entities' Could Eliminate Salary Cap
clusters.summary: Ongoing legal disputes over definition of NIL-linked entities threaten to dismantle college sports compensation guardrails. Ambiguity could trigger unrestricted spending and fundamentally reshape recruiting economics.

clusters.leadHeadline: ESPN Defends NCAA Gymnastics Coverage After Minnesota Complaint
clusters.summary: Minnesota challenged ESPN's unequal airtime allocation for gymnastics routines across teams. Highlights equity concerns in women's sports media coverage and production value parity.

clusters.leadHeadline: Athlete-Owned Media Platforms Gain Traction as Brandon Marshall Expands I AM ATHLETE
clusters.summary: Brandon Marshall and athlete-led media ventures bypass traditional networks to build direct fan relationships. Model creates new revenue streams and editorial independence for sports personalities.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Defeats $27M Antitrust Lawsuit Over Packers Songs IP Rights
clusters.summary: Court ruling protects NFL's control of team-related music IP and licensing arrangements. Affirms league's broad intellectual property authority over franchise-associated content.

sidebar.headline: TickPick Acquires Momento App to Expand Fan Experience Platform
Adam Thielen Launches Youth Sports Technology Venture
Chicago Bulls Continue Franchise Makeover as Billy Donovan Departs
Spurs Playoff Fiesta Shirt Night Delayed Until Conference Finals

poll.question: Should public funding for NFL stadiums be capped at a percentage of total project costs?
options: Yes—cities fund too much; teams should cover majority
No—competitive bidding requires flexibility on public share
Case-by-case; depends on team's market size and profitability
Ban public funding entirely; private equity only

predictions.statement: NFL draft rookie contracts will exceed $60M by 2028 due to continued salary cap growth
predictions.rationale: First-overall pick jumped to $55M in 2026; annual NFL revenue increases sustain upward pressure on rookie compensation

predictions.statement: College sports NIL cap will be ruled unenforceable by 2027 absent federal legislation
predictions.rationale: Current 'associated entities' disputes already threatening salary structure; legal ambiguity favors unrestricted spending

predictions.statement: NWSL valuations will exceed $500M per expansion franchise within 18 months of Columbus launch
predictions.rationale: Columbus paid $205M for 18th team; continued investor demand and media rights growth support valuation inflation

predictions.statement: Illinois will approve $5B Bears stadium deal before Q3 2026 deadline
predictions.rationale: Lawmakers racing against clock; relocation threat and economic impact create political momentum for passage

predictions.statement: Churchill Downs will acquire Kentucky Derby IP rights within 24 months of Preakness deal
predictions.rationale: Consolidating Triple Crown IP; $85M Preakness investment signals aggressive strategy to centralize racing media rights
